responsibilities: Design roadway geometry, intersections, and signal layouts using Civil 3D to meet AASHTO and local design standards
Conduct traffic impact studies and capacity analyses to evaluate the effects of proposed developments on roadway networks
Develop traffic signal timing plans and coordination strategies to optimize intersection performance and reduce congestion
Perform travel demand modeling and forecasting to support long-range transportation planning and infrastructure investment decisions
Prepare construction documents, specifications, and engineering calculations for roadway and intersection improvement projects
Coordinate with municipal and state transportation agencies to secure permits and approvals for design submittals
Conduct field reviews and traffic data collection to validate existing conditions and support design recommendations
Collaborate with civil, structural, and environmental engineers to integrate transportation design into multidisciplinary infrastructure projects
